name: Metaps Inc.
summary: Metaps Inc. engages in big data and artificial intelligence businesses worldwide. It offers payment solutions, such as credit card transactions on the Internet, payment using credit card terminals in real stores, convenience store payment, and electronic money payment. The company also provides various blockchain-focused services comprising cryptocurrency exchange and token generating event agency, etc.; users behavior analysis focusing on applications, metapse analytics that can analyze advertisement effect data in detail, and consulting services to support customers' products and promotion action measures; and marketing solutions centered on the utilization of data, as well as operate movie editing application service, such as Filmstory. In addition, it offers services that include distribution of online advertisements, data analysis, and optimization of sales promotion; support global deployment of application games; Timebank, an exchange that enables users to buy, use, sell, possess expert's time, as well as experts can change the spare time into earnings; and a money communication app pring that allows users to complete money transactions, such as send, receive, pay, charge, and return to account. Metaps Inc. was founded in 2007 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
